title: Cross-lingual Transfer Learning for Low-Resource Bengali NLP Tasks
abstract: We investigate the effectiveness of multilingual pre-trained language models for downstream NLP tasks in Bengali, a historically low-resource language. Our approach achieves state-of-the-art results on sentiment analysis and named entity recognition benchmarks, surpassing prior monolingual baselines by an average of 4.2 F1 points.

title: Efficient Graph Neural Networks for Social Network Analysis
abstract: A study on applying lightweight GNN architectures to community detection and link prediction tasks on large-scale social network datasets. We introduce a sparse attention mechanism that reduces memory footprint by 38% while preserving accuracy within 1% of dense baselines.
